basic_details.job_title: Shipping Corporation of India Chief Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Candidates up to 62 years of age who have an MBBS Degree with a minimum of 5 years post-qualification experience along with valid DG Shipping approval are eligible to apply for these Chief Medical Officer (CMO) vacancies. The online application process for SCI Chief Medical Officer (CMO) Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 12 May 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree, Minimum 5 years post-qualification experience, Valid DG Shipping approval
qualification.details: CMO Mumbai (DG Shipping approved): MBBS Degree from any recognised Indian University/Institute recognised by Medical Council of India (MCI) with minimum 5 years of post-qualification experience. The applicant should have a valid Directorate General of Shipping (DG Shipping) approval at the time of application. Candidates with Post Graduation degree in medicine will be preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Shipping Corporation of India Chief Medical Officer (CMO) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Shipping Corporation of India to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Shipping Corporation of India CMO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Chief Medical Officer (CMO) post is 12 May 2026. Ensure you complete and submit your application before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the CMO post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS Degree from a recognized Indian University/Institute approved by the Medical Council of India (MCI). A valid Directorate General of Shipping (DG Shipping) approval is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Chief Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Chief Medical Officer (CMO) post is 62 years as of the cut-off date for eligibility.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the CMO post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Chief Medical Officer (CMO) position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,03,120/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the CMO post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Chief Medical Officer (CMO) in the Shipping Corporation of India as per the released advertisement HR 01/2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Shipping Corporation of India Chief Medical Officer (CMO) Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the CMO recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the notification, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the CMO post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting candidates based on their eligibility criteria, including qualification, experience, and DG approval, followed by a personal interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the required post-qualification experience for the CMO role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 5 years of post-qualification experience is required for candidates applying for the Chief Medical Officer (CMO) position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
